That's right. He came out of the store, looked confused, and started having trouble staying upright.
He does not appear responsive. Let's assess his alertness.
His eyes do not open spontaneously.
He did not respond to my verbal attempt. Any response in the past?
He moved toward me when I applied gentle pressure to his arm.

12 breaths per minute, regular and unlabored.

IV established in left arm.
